one_time_description: Write off of Racetrack and Holdco assets
economic_notes: Band operates Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP (government business partnership) with revenue of $7,733,022 and net loss of $41,272 for 2020. LLP has cumulative partners deficiency of $1,336,061. Band has guaranteed LLP bank loan of $3,495,610.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to determine appropriate accounting treatment for investment in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (cost vs modified equity basis). Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP is a government business enterprise accounted for under modified equity method with cumulative partners deficiency of $1,336,061; Band has guaranteed its bank loan of $3,495,610. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Kamloops, British Columbia'. No schedule of remuneration provided. No budget presented as Band does not prepare one. COVID-19 note included as fiscal year ended March 31, 2020. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $2,186,777 + FNHA $353,608 + ISC recovery -$17,446 + Province of BC $554,116 = $3,077,055; osr = $4,622,022 - $3,077,055 = $1,544,967. expenses_education includes Education $4,619 + Post Secondary $175,819 + Summer Student $3,957 = $184,395. expenses_administration includes Band Administration $1,046,773 + Chief and Council $194,339 = $1,241,112.
